dialogueChunks.intro: Something terrible happened last night. People are gone: taken from their beds while the settlement slept. The guards found signs of a struggle and tracks leading {location_hint}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We counted the missing at dawn. Three families have lost someone. The {enemy_type} left drag marks and broken doors, but they moved fast. Whoever organized this knew exactly where to strike.
dialogueChunks.outro: I need someone brave enough to follow those tracks before the weather turns. The captors have a head start, but they're moving slow with prisoners. Will you help us, {player_name}?

playerResponses.text: What can you tell me about the attackers?
This sounds too dangerous for me.

dialogueChunks.intro: {target_npc} received a message two days ago: an urgent summons to meet someone {location_hint}. They left at once. They never arrived.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The message was a forgery. {quest_ally} examined the handwriting and confirmed it matches none of our couriers. Someone lured {target_npc} out deliberately, and the {enemy_type} were spotted in that direction days before.
dialogueChunks.outro: We fear the worst, but there's still hope. {target_npc} is resourceful and may still be alive. Will you search for them, {player_name}?

playerResponses.text: I'll find them. Which way did they go?
I'll need supplies before I head out.
They're probably already dead. I'm sorry.

dialogueChunks.intro: A ransom note was pinned to the gate this morning. The {enemy_type} have taken our elder and are demanding {quest_item} in exchange. The deadline is soon.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We cannot pay what they ask: we barely have enough to survive the season. But if we refuse, they've promised to make an example. {quest_ally} thinks their camp is somewhere {location_hint}, based on the messenger's direction.
dialogueChunks.outro: We need someone to either negotiate or strike before the deadline passes. {player_name}, can we count on you?

playerResponses.text: Maybe we can trick them. I'll try.
You should just pay the ransom.
